content: Recommended stack: Tailwind CSS v4 + Shadcn/UI + Radix UI (Shadcn is built on Radix primitives). The combo provides unstyled accessible Radix primitives wrapped with Tailwind utility classes. All Shadcn components updated for Tailwind v4 and React 19. Setup for Vite: install @tailwindcss/vite, configure in vite.config.ts, run shadcn init. Components are copied into src/components/ui — no external dependency, full ownership. Theme customization via CSS variables (OKLCH colors in v4). For a 'warm and friendly' PWA: customize the color palette in globals.css (warm amber/orange/terracotta base colors). Mobile-first by default via Tailwind's sm:/md: breakpoints. Pre-built component libraries (Chakra UI, MUI) are heavier and opinionated — avoid for bundle efficiency.
